design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Super vs Gemini|competitor_comparison|people comparing Super with Gemini|2026-07-06T01:12:23.330861+00:00') → hero=comparison-lab, type=Geist. AIDA Check: Hero grabs attention, proof via sources, desire via workflow video, action via CTA. Font Selection: Geist. Hero Math Verification: clamp() sizing yields 2–3 lines at common widths. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs black/white pills, labels verified.
headline: Super vs Gemini: choosing a personal AI agent for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: A fair, source‑backed comparison of Super and Google Gemini for people evaluating personal AI agents that can operate computers. Gemini is pushing desktop automation hard with Spark and Gemini computer‑use models; Super is purpose‑built for repeated computer‑use workflows with a reusable computer-use cache that compounds value over time.
